plugins.name: orchestrator-core
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestrator: 8 agents (reader, researcher, writer, thinker, checker, reviewer, tester, documenter), 5 skills (orchestrator, orchestrator-plan, orchestrator-execute, orchestrator-subagent, orchestrator-team), dev-tools MCP server (write_findings pipeline contract), full hook suite (SessionStart, SubagentStop JSON-validated blocking, PostToolUse auto-context, PreCompact snapshot with progress.md, TeammateIdle gate, SessionEnd audit). Activate with: Skill("/orchestrator-core:orchestrator") in CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: ty-lsp
plugins.description: Python LSP via Astral ty — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on Python files. Requires: uv tool install ty

plugins.name: vtsls-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript LSP via vtsls — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on .ts/.tsx/.js files. Requires: npm install -g @vtsls/language-server

plugins.name: lua-lsp
plugins.description: Lua LSP via lua-language-server — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on Lua files. Requires: lua-language-server

plugins.name: rust-lsp
plugins.description: Rust LSP via rust-analyzer — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on Rust files. Requires: rust-analyzer

plugins.name: go-lsp
plugins.description: Go LSP via gopls — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on Go files. Requires: gopls
